name: Atlacatl Pupuseria

notes: The current restaurant-issued menu contains 85 actual menu items across 15 sections; the frozen generated record contains only 33 rows representing 25 unique official titles.
Sol corrected Terra's single false missing-item claim: Taquitos de Lengua is present on the current menu and matches frozen item 33 by description.
Post-repair recheck reconciled all 85 current restaurant-issued menu titles in 15 sections with 85 unique generated items.
Frozen reconciliation: 12 exact matches, 13 variant matches, 8 artifacts or duplicate fragments, and no stale extras.
No comprehensive allergen matrix, complete ingredient list, allergen legend, negative-claim coverage, or cross-contact policy was located.
Restaurant-authored menu prose can support direct positive ingredient signals only; absent terms are not negative assurances.
51 items retain only fixed positive signals directly supported by restaurant-authored names or descriptions; 34 items are accurately unavailable.
The flour-or-corn choices on Tacos al Carbon and Tortilla remain unavailable rather than treating optional wheat as a fixed ingredient.
No negative or cross-contact claim is inferred from the absence of a comprehensive guide.
The generic website extraction emitted eight section, navigation, price, social, or description artifacts and substituted descriptions for twelve item titles.
The extraction also omitted most of the current official menu.
Restaurant-specific verified snapshot replaces the incomplete generic extraction, preserves official titles, categories, and descriptions, and removes page-structure artifacts.

sourceAttempts.outcome: Official restaurant site identified Atlacatl Restaurant as Salvadoran Cuisine and Pupuseria and linked the current menu.
The restaurant-issued legacy route presented the same menu family and independently exposed the social-page boilerplate artifact.
No restaurant-linked ordering-vendor menu or allergen surface was identified from the official site.
Targeted current-menu and allergen searches found the official menu but no restaurant-issued allergen guide or cross-contact policy.
The dated official menu route remained publicly readable and corroborated the current menu structure.
Third-party listing corroborated the Arlington restaurant identity only and was not used as allergen authority.

findings.summary: The 33-row generated record omitted 60 titles from the current 85-item official menu and included eight non-item or duplicate artifacts.
findings.resolution: Rebuilt the full current 85-item menu and removed all eight frozen artifacts or duplicate fragments.

findings.summary: Thirteen generated rows used description text as the item identity instead of the restaurant's displayed item title.
findings.resolution: Reconciled all thirteen fragments to canonical official titles, preserving their descriptions on the correct items.

findings.summary: The official menu provides selected direct ingredient prose but no comprehensive allergen matrix, complete ingredients, negative-claim coverage, or cross-contact policy.
findings.resolution: Retained only fixed direct positive disclosures, marked all other results unavailable, and published no negative or cross-contact claims.

repairs.summary: Rebuilt Atlacatl's current 85-item restaurant-issued menu and conservative positive-disclosure allergen data.
verificationCommands: node --test --test-name-pattern='Atlacatl rebuilds the current official menu' scripts/restaurant-pipeline.test.mjs

notes: Terra research: gpt-5.6-terra low, worker run 2026-07-15T15-57-56-396Z-3313d1.
Sol adjudication: gpt-5.6-sol medium. Sol upheld discrepancy_found and corrected Terra's false claim that Taquitos de Lengua was absent.
Canonical item checks remain pending until the complete repaired menu and frozen-item reconciliation are verified.
Focused Atlacatl regression passed: 85 unique current items in 15 sections, 51 fixed direct positive disclosures, and 34 accurately unavailable results.
Tacos al Carbon and Tortilla remain unavailable because their wheat disclosure is configuration-dependent (flour or corn), not a fixed item ingredient.
Post-repair menu recheck: 85 current official titles, 51 fixed direct positive disclosures, 34 accurately unavailable allergen results.
